disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.heading: Disclaimer
disclaimer.s1.title: Nature of Service
disclaimer.s1.body: Liki is an AI content generation tool based on traditional Chinese metaphysics, provided for cultural and entertainment purposes only. Chinese metaphysics — including BaZi (Four Pillars of Destiny), compatibility analysis, and name selection — is a body of traditional knowledge that has developed over more than two thousand years. It draws on the Gan-Zhi sexagenary cycle, the theory of the Five Elements (Wu Xing), Yin-Yang philosophy, and the Chinese lunisolar calendar. These systems are cultural and philosophical in nature, not scientific in the modern sense. They have not been validated through controlled experimentation, peer review, or the scientific method as understood in contemporary natural and social sciences. Liki does not present its services as scientific instruments, diagnostic tools, or professional advisory services of any kind. Users should understand that the interpretations and analyses provided by our platform are generated by artificial intelligence models trained on patterns found in traditional metaphysical literature. The output reflects centuries of cultural practice and textual tradition — not empirically verified claims. We encourage all users to approach the service with curiosity, an open mind, and a clear understanding of the distinction between cultural heritage and scientific knowledge. Nothing on this website or in any generated report constitutes professional advice in medicine, psychology, law, finance, career planning, or any other regulated field. If you require professional guidance in any of these areas, please consult a qualified practitioner licensed in your jurisdiction.
disclaimer.s2.title: AI Content Disclosure
disclaimer.s2.body: Content generated by Liki is produced by artificial intelligence systems, specifically large language models, based on traditional Chinese metaphysical algorithms. AI-generated content is inherently probabilistic and may contain inaccuracies, inconsistencies, or artifacts commonly referred to as 'hallucinations' — where the AI generates plausible-sounding but factually incorrect statements. While we implement prompt engineering, content filtering, and quality monitoring measures to reduce such occurrences, we cannot guarantee that all AI-generated content is free from errors. Reports are generated by AI without human review or editing before delivery. No human expert reviews, validates, or endorses the content of individual reports before they are provided to users. Users should understand that AI interpretations of metaphysical concepts are computational outputs, not the product of human understanding, intuition, or professional metaphysical practice. The Service should not be compared to or used as a substitute for consultation with a qualified human metaphysical practitioner who can apply nuanced contextual understanding.
disclaimer.s3.title: Not Professional Advice
disclaimer.s3.body: All content provided by Liki, whether generated by AI or presented as system information, is for cultural and entertainment purposes only. It is not intended to and does not constitute professional advice of any kind. Specifically: Medical Advice: Liki does not provide medical diagnosis, treatment recommendations, health predictions, or any form of healthcare guidance. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional for medical concerns. Legal Advice: Liki does not provide legal opinions, legal strategy, or guidance on legal matters. Consult a licensed attorney for legal issues. Financial & Investment Advice: Liki does not provide financial planning, investment recommendations, market predictions, or business strategy. Consult a qualified financial advisor before making financial decisions. Psychological & Mental Health Advice: Liki does not provide psychological counseling, therapy, mental health assessment, or emotional support services. If you are experiencing mental health challenges, please contact a licensed mental health professional or crisis support service. Life Decisions: Do not base major life decisions — including but not limited to marriage, divorce, career change, relocation, medical treatment, or significant financial commitments — solely or primarily on content generated by Liki.
disclaimer.s4.title: Accuracy of Results
disclaimer.s4.body: Analysis results are influenced by multiple factors including but not limited to: the accuracy of input data provided by the user; precision of birthplace coordinate resolution and timezone conversion; true solar time correction algorithms; the inherent variability of different metaphysical calculation schools and interpretation frameworks; and the probabilistic nature of AI language model outputs. Different algorithms, reference sources, and schools of thought within Chinese metaphysics may yield different, sometimes contradictory conclusions from the same input data. The analysis results of this tool represent algorithmic outputs based on specific implementations and do not represent the only possible or 'correct' answer. We do not claim that our algorithmic implementations or AI interpretations are definitive, authoritative, or superior to other approaches. Users should view analysis results as one reference point among many and exercise their own judgment when considering the content.
disclaimer.s5.title: Forward-Looking & Predictive Statements
disclaimer.s5.body: Some content generated by Liki may contain statements about future events, trends, or outcomes, including fortune forecasts, yearly or daily luck predictions, Da Yun life-cycle analyses, compatibility projections, and naming-related future implications. These statements are forward-looking in nature and are based on traditional metaphysical frameworks and algorithmic interpretations, not on empirical data, scientific models, or evidence-based forecasting methods. Forward-looking statements are inherently speculative and subject to numerous factors, uncertainties, and risks that cannot be predicted or controlled. Actual events and outcomes may differ materially from any predictions or projections contained in AI-generated content. We make no representation or warranty that any predicted event, outcome, or fortune will occur as described or at all. Users should not rely on forward-looking statements as predictions of actual future events or as a basis for planning or decision-making.
disclaimer.s6.title: Cultural & Regional Differences
disclaimer.s6.body: Chinese metaphysical traditions encompass diverse schools, regional variations, and historical periods of development. Practices and interpretations that are standard in one region or tradition may differ from or even contradict those in another. Differences may arise from: variations between mainland Chinese, Taiwanese, Hong Kong, Southeast Asian, and overseas Chinese diaspora traditions; different classical source texts and commentaries that different schools prioritize; regional calendar systems and timekeeping conventions that affect birth time interpretation; and evolving contemporary practices that may differ from historical methods. Liki's algorithms and AI training reflect specific implementation choices that may align more closely with certain traditions than others. We acknowledge that no single system can represent the full diversity of Chinese metaphysical thought. Content should be understood as reflecting general principles rather than the doctrines of any particular school or lineage. We respect that users from different cultural backgrounds may have different expectations regarding metaphysical consultation and content presentation.
disclaimer.s7.title: User Responsibility
disclaimer.s7.body: Users bear sole and complete responsibility for any decisions made and their consequences arising from the use of this Service. By using Liki, you acknowledge and agree that: you will view analysis results with a critical and rational mindset; you will not rely on Service content as the sole or primary basis for major life decisions; you understand that AI-generated content may contain errors and that no human expert reviews your report before delivery; you will seek appropriate professional advice for matters requiring professional expertise; and you use the Service entirely at your own risk. Liki is not responsible for any loss, damage, or adverse outcome resulting from your reliance on Service content or from decisions you make based on or influenced by Service content. We encourage users to treat the Service as a tool for cultural exploration and personal reflection rather than as an authoritative source of guidance.
disclaimer.s8.title: Third Party Content & External Links
disclaimer.s8.body: AI-generated content may occasionally reference or link to third-party resources, websites, publications, or materials. Such references are generated algorithmically and do not imply our endorsement, verification, or responsibility for the accuracy, legality, or appropriateness of third-party content. We do not review, control, or monitor third-party websites or resources that may be referenced in AI-generated content. Accessing such external resources is at your own risk. If users submit or share content through the Service — such as feedback, comments, or suggestions — such user-generated content does not reflect our views and we assume no responsibility for it. We may, but are not obligated to, monitor, review, or remove user-submitted content. If you believe that AI-generated content in your report contains inappropriate references to third-party materials, please contact us at hi@liki.hk.
disclaimer.s9.title: Technical Disclaimer
disclaimer.s9.body: We strive to ensure reliable and continuous operation of the Service but do not guarantee that the Service will be uninterrupted, timely, secure, or error-free. We assume no responsibility for: service interruptions, delays, or data loss caused by system maintenance (scheduled or emergency), network or infrastructure failures, third-party service outages (including payment processors, email services, and AI model providers), or force majeure events; temporary unavailability due to technical issues, upgrades, or capacity constraints; any errors, omissions, or inaccuracies in Service content resulting from software bugs, algorithm errors, or AI model behavior; or compatibility issues with specific devices, browsers, or operating systems. The Service may be updated, modified, suspended, or discontinued at any time without prior notice. We reserve the right to limit the availability of the Service to certain geographic regions or to restrict access for compliance with applicable laws or regulations.
disclaimer.s10.title: Disclaimer of Warranties
disclaimer.s10.body: THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED ON AN 'AS IS' AND 'AS AVAILABLE' BASIS, WITH ALL FAULTS AND WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, WHETHER EXPRESS, IMPLIED, OR STATUTORY. TO THE FULLEST EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, LIKI AND ITS OPERATORS, AFFILIATES, LICENSORS, AND SERVICE PROVIDERS EXPRESSLY DISCLAIM ALL WARRANTIES, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO: IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, TITLE, AND NON-INFRINGEMENT; WARRANTIES ARISING FROM COURSE OF DEALING, COURSE OF PERFORMANCE, OR USAGE OF TRADE; WARRANTIES THAT THE SERVICE WILL MEET YOUR REQUIREMENTS, ACHIEVE ANY INTENDED RESULTS, BE COMPATIBLE WITH ANY PARTICULAR SOFTWARE OR SYSTEMS, OR THAT ANY ERRORS OR DEFECTS WILL BE CORRECTED; AND WARRANTIES REGARDING THE ACCURACY, COMPLETENESS, TIMELINESS, OR RELIABILITY OF ANY AI-GENERATED CONTENT. NO ADVICE OR INFORMATION, WHETHER ORAL OR WRITTEN, OBTAINED FROM LIKI OR THROUGH THE SERVICE SHALL CREATE ANY WARRANTY NOT EXPRESSLY STATED IN THIS DISCLAIMER. SOME JURISDICTIONS DO NOT ALLOW THE EXCLUSION OF CERTAIN WARRANTIES, SO SOME OF THE ABOVE EXCLUSIONS MAY NOT APPLY TO YOU. IN SUCH CASES, THE EXCLUSIONS AND LIMITATIONS IN THIS SECTION APPLY TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW.
about.title: About
about.heading: About
about.s1.title: What Is Liki
about.s1.body: Liki is an AI naming advisor that helps people discover meaningful names through the combination of artificial intelligence, language, culture, and traditional Chinese naming principles. A meaningful name is never determined by a single rule — it emerges from the balance of language, culture, tradition, and human intention. AI helps people understand this process and make thoughtful naming decisions.
about.s2.title: Technology & Methodology
about.s2.body: Liki's system is built on a clean separation between deterministic computation and generative interpretation. The computational engine is responsible for mathematically precise calculations derived from the traditional Chinese Gan-Zhi sexagenary calendar system. This engine converts a user's Gregorian birth date and time — corrected to true solar time based on birthplace longitude — into the corresponding Heavenly Stem and Earthly Branch for each of the Four Pillars (year, month, day, hour). From these pillars, the engine derives the complete set of traditional analytical components: the Ten Gods relational indicators, Hidden Stems within each Earthly Branch, Na Yin elemental classifications, Shen Sha spirit indicators, the Da Yun ten-year fortune cycle series, and seasonal adjustment factors. This computational layer operates deterministically — given the same input, it always produces the same output, and its algorithms are based on publicly documented traditional methods and astronomical calendar conversions. The generative layer — powered by a large language model — takes the structured output of the computational engine and produces the narrative interpretation that the user reads. The AI is guided by carefully designed prompts that anchor its output to the computed data while allowing it to draw on its broad training in Chinese metaphysical texts to contextualize and explain the findings in natural, accessible language. It is important to understand this division: the calculations are rule-based and reproducible; the interpretations are AI-generated and probabilistic. We are transparent about this distinction and do not claim that the AI's interpretive output carries the authority of a human practitioner or represents any single orthodox school of Chinese metaphysical thought.
about.s3.title: Our Philosophy
about.s3.body: Liki's core philosophy: Meaning before novelty. Balance over extremes. Respect tradition while embracing AI. Help people make thoughtful decisions. We are committed to transparency: no mystification, no exploiting curiosity or anxiety to create information asymmetry, no fear-based marketing tactics. We respect traditional Chinese naming culture as part of the Chinese cultural heritage. Our position is clear: AI organizes and interprets naming knowledge — it is not a spokesperson for supernatural forces or an authoritative judge. Every recommendation has reasoning, but we encourage independent thinking and rational judgment.
about.s4.title: AI Ethics & Cultural Heritage
about.s4.body: Liki follows responsible AI development principles. We transparently disclose the nature of AI-generated content without using vague language to imply human expert authority. We do not claim to predict destiny, do not guarantee perfect names, and do not promote fatalism. Regarding cultural heritage: we view traditional Chinese naming principles as part of Chinese cultural heritage, presenting them with respect and accuracy, opposing distortion, excessive commercialization, or decontextualized appropriation. Regarding AI training data ethics, we commit: user birth data and generated reports will never be used to train, fine-tune, or evaluate any AI model.
about.s5.title: Team & Background
about.s5.body: Liki is developed by a cross-cultural team with expertise in software engineering, traditional Chinese metaphysics, and AI systems. Our technical team brings experience in building reliable, secure web services and working with large language models. Our metaphysical knowledge contributors include practitioners familiar with multiple schools of BaZi and naming traditions. We maintain relationships with cultural consultants to help ensure terminology accuracy and cultural appropriateness across our Chinese and English language offerings. Liki is an independent project; we are not affiliated with any religious organization, fortune-telling chain, or metaphysical school. Our funding comes from service fees paid by users, which supports ongoing development and quality improvement. We do not sell user data, run advertisements, or accept payment for biased results.
about.s6.title: Contact Us
about.s6.body: For any questions, suggestions, or partnership inquiries, please contact us via email at hi@liki.hk. We welcome feedback on content accuracy, cultural representation, and technical issues. While we strive to respond promptly, please allow up to 3 business days for a reply. For privacy-specific inquiries, you may also contact our Data Protection Officer at the same address. If you are a researcher, journalist, or cultural institution interested in our work, we welcome substantive inquiries about our methodology, training approach, and content policies.
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.s1.title: Email
contact.s1.body: For any questions, suggestions, or partnership inquiries, please email us at hi@liki.hk. We respond within 2-3 business days.
contact.s2.title: Official Accounts
contact.s3.title: Feedback
contact.s3.body: We value every user's feedback. When reporting technical issues, please include relevant screenshots and a brief description so we can resolve them more efficiently.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1.title: Information We Collect
privacy.s1.body: Liki collects only the minimum information necessary to perform its core function: generating Chinese metaphysical analyses and reports. The data we collect is limited to what you actively and voluntarily provide through our forms or chat interface. This includes: birth date (year, month, day), birth time (hour and optionally minute), birth location (city or geographic coordinates), and gender. For compatibility analysis, the same categories of information are collected for both individuals. This is the full extent of personal data we collect. We do not require or request: your real name, identity document numbers, phone numbers, residential or mailing addresses, social media accounts, or any other personally identifiable information beyond what is listed above. In addition to the birth information you provide, we automatically collect minimal metadata associated with your session: your language preference, the timestamp of your interaction, and anonymized usage statistics necessary for basic service operation and security. This metadata collection aligns with the data minimization principles established by the Hong Kong Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (PDPO), the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) Article 5(1)(c), and the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA). We do not purchase, license, or otherwise acquire personal data from third-party data brokers or aggregators. All information we hold about you is information you chose to provide to us for the purpose of using our service.
privacy.s2.title: How We Use Information
privacy.s2.body: The birth information you provide to Liki is used solely for the purpose of generating the metaphysical analysis and report you have requested. Specifically, your data follows this processing pathway: Input Collection — You provide birth date, time, location, and gender through our form or chat interface. Computational Processing — Our deterministic engine converts your input into the Four Pillars, Ten Gods, Hidden Stems, Na Yin, Shen Sha, Da Yun, and other traditional analytical components. AI Interpretation — The structured computational output is passed to the AI language model, which generates the narrative interpretation you receive as your report. Report Delivery — The generated report is stored and made accessible via a unique, unguessable URL. If you provide your email address, the report link is emailed to you. This is the complete and exclusive processing pathway for your data. We do not use your birth information for advertising purposes, user profiling, behavioral analysis, cross-site tracking, algorithmic recommendation engines, market research, demographic analysis, or any commercial purpose beyond delivering the service you requested. We do not sell, rent, trade, license, or share your information with any third party for their own commercial purposes. We do not combine your data with data from other sources to build user profiles. We do not use your data to train, fine-tune, or improve our AI models. Contractors and service providers who process data on our behalf (such as our email delivery provider) do so under binding data processing agreements that limit their use to the specific purpose we have engaged them for.
privacy.s3.title: Legal Basis for Processing
privacy.s3.body: We process your personal data based on the following legal grounds under applicable data protection laws: (1) Consent — by providing your birth information and proceeding with our services, you give explicit consent for us to process this data for metaphysical calculation and report generation purposes, per GDPR Article 6(1)(a); (2) Performance of a Contract — processing necessary to deliver the digital content service you have requested, per GDPR Article 6(1)(b); (3) Legitimate Interests — we have a legitimate interest in maintaining basic service analytics and preventing fraud or abuse of our services, per GDPR Article 6(1)(f), provided these interests are not overridden by your data protection rights. You may withdraw consent at any time by requesting deletion of your data; however, this will not affect the lawfulness of processing carried out before withdrawal.
privacy.s4.title: Data Storage & Security
privacy.s4.body: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. These measures include: encryption of data at rest and in transit using industry-standard TLS protocols; access controls limiting data access to authorized personnel only; and regular security review of our systems. Reports are stored with encryption, and report links use randomly generated unique identifiers accessible only to those who hold the link. We retain calculation input data only for the duration necessary to generate your report and complete the payment process. Report data is retained for a period of 12 months from the date of generation to allow you to access your purchased content, after which it is permanently deleted from our systems. Payment information is processed by a third-party payment providers (Dodo Payments and XunhuPay) certified to PCI-DSS Level 1 standards; we do not store your credit card, debit card, or payment account details on our servers. In the event of a data breach affecting your personal data, we will notify affected users and relevant supervisory authorities in accordance with applicable legal requirements within 72 hours of becoming aware.
privacy.s5.title: International Data Transfers
privacy.s5.body: Your data may be transferred to and processed in countries outside your country of residence, including Hong Kong, Singapore, and the United States, where our servers and service providers are located. These jurisdictions may have data protection laws that differ from those in your country. When transferring personal data from the European Economic Area (EEA) or the United Kingdom to third countries, we rely on: (i) adequacy decisions by the European Commission or UK government where applicable; (ii) standard contractual clauses (SCCs) approved by the European Commission; or (iii) other valid transfer mechanisms as provided under applicable data protection law. For residents of the People's Republic of China, we note that cross-border data transfers are conducted in compliance with the Personal Information Protection Law (PIPL) requirements, including obtaining separate consent where required and conducting personal information protection impact assessments. By using our services, you acknowledge and consent to such international transfers as described in this policy.
privacy.s6.title: Cookies & Tracking Technologies
privacy.s6.body: This website uses minimal cookies and similar technologies. Specifically: Essential cookies: we use a session cookie to remember your language preference (zh, hk, or en) across pages. This cookie is strictly necessary for the multilingual functionality of the site and does not track your behavior across other websites. Analytics: we use a lightweight, self-hosted analytics solution to collect anonymized, aggregate visit statistics (page views, referrer, browser type). No personal identifiers, IP addresses, or fingerprints are stored. This data helps us understand which pages and languages are most used. We do not use third-party advertising cookies, social media trackers, cross-site tracking technologies, or any form of behavioral advertising. You can disable cookies in your browser settings; the core functionality of the site (including report generation and payment) does not depend on cookies. Under the EU ePrivacy Directive and GDPR, we rely on legitimate interest for essential cookies and provide the option to decline analytics cookies where applicable law requires opt-in consent.
privacy.s7.title: Your Rights
privacy.s7.body: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the following rights regarding your personal data: Right of Access — you may request confirmation of whether we process your data and obtain a copy. Right to Rectification — you may request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data. Right to Erasure ('Right to be Forgotten') — you may request deletion of your data, subject to legal retention obligations. Right to Restriction of Processing — you may request that we limit how we use your data in certain circumstances. Right to Data Portability — you may request your data in a structured, commonly used, machine-readable format. Right to Object — you may object to processing based on legitimate interests. Rights regarding automated decision-making — our AI generates content for cultural entertainment purposes; we do not make legally or similarly significant decisions based solely on automated processing. For California residents: under CCPA/CPRA, you have the right to know what personal information is collected, to delete personal information, to opt out of the sale or sharing of personal information (we do not sell or share your data), and to non-discrimination for exercising these rights. To exercise any of these rights, contact us at hi@liki.hk. We will respond within the timeframe required by applicable law, typically 30 days, extendable by an additional 30 days for complex requests. We may need to verify your identity before processing requests.
privacy.s8.title: Children's Privacy
privacy.s8.body: Our services are not directed at children, and we do not knowingly collect personal information from children as defined under applicable laws. Specifically: Under the U.S. Children's Online Privacy Protection Act (COPPA), we do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13 years of age. Under the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), we do not knowingly process personal data of children under 16 years of age without parental consent where required by Member State law. Under the PRC Personal Information Protection Law (PIPL), we do not knowingly process personal information of minors under 14 years of age without parental or guardian consent. Under Hong Kong's Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance, we apply appropriate measures regarding the collection and processing of data relating to minors. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us immediately at hi@liki.hk. Upon verification, we will promptly delete such information from our systems. We recommend that parents and guardians supervise their children's online activities and consider using parental control tools.
privacy.s9.title: Third Party Services & Sub-Processors
privacy.s9.body: We engage the following third-party service providers (sub-processors) to deliver our services: Dodo Payments (dodopayments.com) — international card payment processing, certified to PCI-DSS Level 1. XunhuPay (xunhupay.com) — WeChat Pay and Alipay payment processing for users in mainland China. Their privacy policy applies to data they process as a controller. Resend (resend.com) — transactional email delivery for report download links. Email addresses are transmitted to Resend solely for the purpose of delivering your purchased report. AI Model Provider — our service uses large language model APIs to generate report content. Input data (birth dates, times, locations, gender) is transmitted for the purpose of content generation. We have agreements in place with all sub-processors requiring them to implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data. We do not authorize sub-processors to use your data for their own purposes, including model training or service improvement. This list of sub-processors may be updated from time to time. Material changes will be reflected in updates to this privacy policy.
privacy.s10.title: Contact, Complaints & Supervisory Authority
privacy.s10.body: For privacy-related inquiries, data subject requests, or complaints about our data handling practices, please contact our Data Protection team at hi@liki.hk. We are committed to resolving privacy concerns promptly and fairly. Under GDPR Article 77, if you are located in the European Economic Area, you have the right to lodge a complaint with your local supervisory authority if you believe our processing of your personal data violates applicable data protection law. A list of EU data protection authorities is available at edpb.europa.eu. Under PIPL, residents of the People's Republic of China may file complaints with the Cyberspace Administration of China (CAC) or other designated authorities. Under California law, California residents may contact the California Privacy Protection Agency. We encourage you to contact us first to allow us the opportunity to address your concerns directly. We will not retaliate against any individual who exercises their data protection rights or files a complaint in good faith.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.heading: Terms of Service
terms.s1.title: Acceptance of Terms
terms.s1.body: By accessing or using the Liki website and services (collectively, the 'Service'), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ('Terms'). If you do not agree to these Terms, you must not access or use the Service. You represent that you are at least 18 years of age, or the age of majority in your jurisdiction, or that you are using the Service under the supervision of a parent or legal guardian who agrees to these Terms on your behalf. If you are using the Service on behalf of an organization, you represent that you have the authority to bind that organization to these Terms. These Terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you and the operator of Liki. We may require you to affirmatively accept these Terms through a click-through mechanism before completing a purchase; such acceptance is additional confirmation of your agreement and does not replace the binding effect of your use of the Service.
terms.s2.title: Service Description
terms.s2.body: Liki provides AI-generated digital content services including BaZi (Four Pillars of Destiny) chart interpretation, relationship compatibility analysis (He Pan), and intelligent naming recommendations. All services are digital content products delivered electronically upon completion of purchase. Service content is generated by artificial intelligence algorithms processing user-provided birth information through traditional Chinese metaphysical calculation frameworks. All Service content is provided for cultural and entertainment purposes only and does not constitute professional advice of any kind, including but not limited to medical, legal, financial, psychological, or investment advice. The Service does not guarantee any specific outcome, prediction, or result. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any aspect of the Service at any time, with reasonable notice to users who have purchased services that may be affected.
terms.s3.title: User Responsibilities
terms.s3.body: As a user of the Service, you agree to: (a) provide accurate and complete birth information to the best of your knowledge — we are not responsible for analysis deviations caused by incorrect or incomplete input data; (b) maintain the confidentiality of your report links and email communications; (c) use the Service only for lawful purposes and in compliance with all applicable laws and regulations; (d) not use the Service to generate content that is illegal, harmful, threatening, abusive, harassing, defamatory, or otherwise objectionable; (e) not attempt to reverse engineer, decompile, or extract the source code, algorithms, or training data of the Service; (f) not use automated means (bots, scrapers, crawlers) to access or extract data from the Service without prior written permission; (g) not resell, redistribute, or sublicense any content generated by the Service for commercial purposes. Users under 18 years of age should use this Service only under the supervision of a parent or legal guardian.
terms.s4.title: Acceptable Use Policy
terms.s4.body: You agree not to use the Service in any manner that: (a) violates any applicable local, national, or international law or regulation, including export control laws and economic sanctions; (b) infringes upon the intellectual property rights, privacy rights, or other rights of any third party; (c) transmits any viruses, malware, or other harmful code; (d) attempts to gain unauthorized access to our systems, servers, or networks; (e) interferes with or disrupts the Service or its underlying infrastructure; (f) engages in fraudulent, false, or misleading activity, including providing false birth data with intent to abuse free trial or demo features; (g) uses the Service to generate, distribute, or promote content related to illegal gambling, unlicensed financial advice, or activities that require regulatory licensing. We reserve the right to investigate and take appropriate legal action against anyone who violates this Acceptable Use Policy, including terminating access to the Service and reporting violations to law enforcement authorities.
terms.s5.title: Payment, Pricing & Refunds
terms.s5.body: Service prices are as displayed on the purchase page at the time of order and are subject to change without prior notice. All prices are listed and charged in United States Dollars (USD) or Chinese Yuan (CNY) depending on the payment provider selected. For user convenience, approximate prices may be displayed in Chinese Yuan (CNY) or Hong Kong Dollars (HKD) alongside USD prices; these approximations are based on current exchange rates at the time of display, and the final charged amount is always in USD at the exchange rate determined by the payment processor at the time of transaction. Payments are processed by Dodo Payments (international cards) or XunhuPay (WeChat/Alipay). By making a purchase, you agree to Dodo Payments' terms of service and privacy policy. Due to the nature of digital content products that are generated and delivered immediately upon purchase, refunds are generally not provided after a report has been generated and delivered. If you experience a technical issue resulting in successful payment but no report generation or delivery, please contact us at hi@liki.hk within 7 days of the transaction for resolution. We reserve the right to refuse refund requests that we determine, in our sole discretion, to be abusive, fraudulent, or made in bad faith.
terms.s6.title: Intellectual Property
terms.s6.body: The Service and its original content, features, and functionality — including but not limited to source code, website design, user interface, branding, logos, algorithms, and proprietary calculation engines — are owned by or licensed to Liki and are protected by applicable intellectual property laws. AI-generated report content: upon full payment, you are granted a non-exclusive, non-transferable, personal license to access, view, download, and print your generated report for personal, non-commercial use only. You may not resell, redistribute, publicly display, or create derivative works from report content for commercial purposes without prior written permission. The traditional metaphysical knowledge systems (Gan-Zhi calendar, BaZi, Na Yin, Zi Wei Dou Shu principles) underlying our algorithms are part of the public domain cultural heritage. Our specific software implementation and AI training methodology are proprietary. If you believe that any content on our Service infringes your copyright, you may submit a DMCA takedown notice to hi@liki.hk with: (i) identification of the copyrighted work; (ii) identification of the infringing material; (iii) your contact information; (iv) a statement of good faith belief; and (v) a statement under penalty of perjury that the information is accurate and you are authorized to act on behalf of the copyright owner.
terms.s7.title: Third Party Services
terms.s7.body: The Service integrates with or relies upon third-party services that are not under our control: Payment processing is provided by Dodo Payments and XunhuPay; email delivery is provided by Resend; AI content generation utilizes large language model APIs provided by third-party AI service providers. We do not warrant, endorse, or assume responsibility for any third-party service, content, or practice. Your use of third-party services integrated into the Service is at your own risk and subject to the respective third party's terms and policies. We are not liable for any loss or damage arising from your use of or reliance on third-party services. Links to external websites or resources that may appear in AI-generated content are provided for convenience and do not imply endorsement. We are not responsible for the availability, accuracy, or content of such external resources.
terms.s8.title: Limitation of Liability
terms.s8.body: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, in no event shall Liki, its operators, affiliates, directors, employees, agents, or licensors be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including without limitation loss of profits, data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses, resulting from: (a) your use or inability to use the Service; (b) any conduct or content of any third party on the Service; (c) unauthorized access, use, or alteration of your data; or (d) any errors or omissions in AI-generated content. Our total aggregate liability for any claims arising from or relating to the Service shall not exceed the amount you paid us for the specific service giving rise to the claim during the 12 months preceding the event. Some jurisdictions do not allow the exclusion or limitation of liability for certain types of damages, so the above limitations may not apply to you in whole or in part. In such jurisdictions, our liability is limited to the maximum extent permitted by law.
terms.s9.title: Indemnification
terms.s9.body: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless Liki, its operators, affiliates, officers, directors, employees, agents, and licensors from and against any and all claims, liabilities, damages, losses, costs, and expenses (including reasonable attorneys' fees) arising out of or related to: (a) your access to or use of the Service; (b) your violation of these Terms or any applicable law; (c) your infringement of any third-party rights, including intellectual property or privacy rights; (d) any content you submit or transmit through the Service; or (e) your negligence or willful misconduct. We reserve the right, at our own expense, to assume the exclusive defense and control of any matter otherwise subject to indemnification by you, in which event you agree to cooperate with our defense of such claim. You shall not settle any claim that affects us without our prior written consent.
terms.s10.title: Termination
terms.s10.body: These Terms continue to apply until terminated by either you or us. You may terminate these Terms at any time by ceasing all use of the Service and, if you wish, requesting deletion of your data by contacting hi@liki.hk. We may terminate or suspend your access to the Service immediately, without prior notice or liability, if: (a) you breach any provision of these Terms; (b) we are required to do so by law or regulatory authority; (c) we decide to discontinue the Service, in whole or in part; or (d) we determine that your continued use of the Service poses a risk to our systems, users, or legal compliance. Upon termination, your right to use the Service will immediately cease. Provisions that by their nature should survive termination shall survive, including but not limited to: intellectual property, limitation of liability, indemnification, governing law, and any accrued payment obligations. If you have purchased reports prior to termination, you retain the right to access those reports for the duration of our data retention period as described in our Privacy Policy.
terms.s11.title: Governing Law & Dispute Resolution
terms.s11.body: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region of the People's Republic of China, without regard to its conflict of law provisions. For users located in the European Economic Area, United Kingdom, or other jurisdictions with mandatory consumer protection laws: nothing in these Terms limits your rights under such mandatory laws, and you may bring claims in the courts of your country of residence. For all other disputes: you and Liki agree to first attempt to resolve any dispute informally by contacting us at hi@liki.hk. If the dispute cannot be resolved informally within 60 days, either party may submit the dispute to binding arbitration administered by the Hong Kong International Arbitration Centre (HKIAC) under its administered arbitration rules in effect at the time of filing. The arbitration shall be conducted in Hong Kong in the English language before a single arbitrator. The arbitrator's award shall be final and binding, and judgment on the award may be entered in any court having jurisdiction. Each party bears its own costs, except as otherwise determined by the arbitrator. Nothing in this section prevents either party from seeking injunctive or equitable relief from a court of competent jurisdiction to prevent irreparable harm.
terms.s12.title: Changes to Terms
terms.s12.body: We reserve the right to modify or replace these Terms at any time. When material changes are made, we will provide notice by: (a) posting the updated Terms on this page with a revised 'Last updated' date; and (b) for material changes that affect existing users, displaying a notice on the website for at least 30 days following the change. It is your responsibility to review these Terms periodically for changes. Your continued use of the Service after any modification constitutes your acceptance of the revised Terms. If you do not agree to the revised Terms, you must stop using the Service. Changes that are required by law or that relate to new Service features will be effective immediately. For existing paid services, changes will not retroactively alter the terms that were in effect at the time of your purchase unless required by law.
index.reportPreview.quote1: Observe the water with skill — one must observe its waves
index.reportPreview.quote2: See the subtle to know the sprout, see the clue to know the end
index.reportPreview.quote3: Wangshu went ahead as her harbinger
index.reportPreview.quote4: Pure renown of brush and inkstone — a legacy of letters
index.reportPreview.quote5: Bleat, bleat goes the deer, feeding on wild artemisia
index.reportPreview.quote6: Granting peace and well-being — tranquil years ahead
index.reportPreview.quote7: Patterned cushion in the long chariot — driving my piebald steed
index.reportPreview.quote8: Dong Anyu wore a bowstring to urge himself onward
index.reportPreview.quote9: Knowledge is the beginning of action; action is the completion of knowledge
index.reportPreview.quote10: Sincerity of thought — this is the Dao of humanity
index.reportPreview.quote11: Be bright and wise, to preserve one's self
index.reportPreview.quote12: Words thoughtful and trustworthy, deeds thoughtful and joyful
index.reportPreview.quote13: Return to authenticity and simplicity — then lifelong no disgrace
index.reportPreview.quote14: Long, long is the road of cultivation ahead
index.reportPreview.quote15: Thinking of the noble one — gentle as polished jade
index.reportPreview.quote16: Hidden excellence may abide — revealed in its time
index.reportPreview.quote17: Jifu composed the ode — serene as the clear breeze
index.reportPreview.quote18: Without tranquility, one cannot reach far
index.reportPreview.quote19: The highest good is like water, benefiting all without contention
index.reportPreview.quote20: High mountains look up — the great road leads on
index.reportPreview.quote21: I nurture my vast, flowing spirit
index.reportPreview.quote22: Enlighten the young to cultivate righteousness — this is sacred work
index.reportPreview.quote23: When you see a worthy person, seek to emulate them
index.reportPreview.source24: Zhuge Liang's Admonition to His Son
index.reportPreview.quote25: The way of great learning lies in illuminating bright virtue
index.reportPreview.quote26: Be reverent, be reverent, for Heaven watches all
index.reportPreview.quote27: The noble person is slow in speech but quick in action
index.reportPreview.quote28: Great skill appears clumsy, great eloquence seems tongue-tied
index.reportPreview.quote29: Clear breeze and bright moon — thoughts turn to Xuandu
index.reportPreview.quote30: Let it come and go — clouds unfurl at will
index.reportPreview.quote31: Heart at ease, spirit bright — serene and composed
index.reportPreview.quote32: Blue, blue is your collar — long, long my yearning heart
index.reportPreview.quote33: Reflect quietly on your words — let conduct be measured
index.reportPreview.quote34: Tilling the inkstone field — the literary lineage endures
index.reportPreview.quote35: Like a dry tree meeting spring — all things renew
index.reportPreview.quote36: Writing to purify the heart — clear and self-contained
index.cta.title: Find Your Name
index.cta.body: Enter your email to get started. After payment, you have 7 days of consultation.
report.banner.text: This is your personal report link. Bookmark or copy to save.
